name: Italian Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Beat egg yolks until thick.
Mix in sugar, lemon and orange juice, and rum extract with the egg yolks.
Sift cake flour twice and gradually add it to the egg yolk mixture.
Beat egg whites until foamy.
Add salt and beat until stiff.
Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
Pour batter into a greased pan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour.
Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan, then carefully invert it onto a wire rack to cool further.
Once fully cooled, sprinkle with confectioner's sugar.
